name: STALE: re-accepting binds to the CURRENT hash and clears the state
a PIN can be set on the isolated install
precondition: the install is unaccepted again

PIN-PROTECTED: the lock screen is behind the gate, not in front of it
PIN-PROTECTED: after consent, the PIN lock is what remains
unlocked the isolated install to authorise the reset
reset-data accepted
RESET ERASES ACCEPTANCE: the record returns to `none`
after a reset the gate RE-FIRES
and it re-fires as NONE, not stale — the next holder is not shown someone else's consent
